clusters.justification: These terms map onto limbic and salience network co-activations, representing the broad functional axis responsible for processing arousal, emotional salience, and valenced physiological states.
These terms co-activate within the striato-cortical circuitry, representing the macroscopic domain of computing subjective utility, incentive salience, and driving goal-directed behavior.
Anchored primarily in the Default Mode Network, these terms represent the latent, high-level, internally-directed axis of processing self-other representations and internal models of social agents.
